## Engineering Checklist
- [ ] **Formatting:** Code has been formatted locally via `npm run format` (Prettier).
- [ ] **Linting:** Shopify Theme Check passes with no new violations.
- [ ] **Testing:** Verified across major browsers and mobile viewports.
- [ ] **Performance:** No unoptimized assets or heavy synchronous JavaScript introduced.
- [ ] **Accessibility:** Semantic HTML and appropriate ARIA attributes utilized.
